ham.subject: Account Alert: Recent Transaction
ham.body:
Hello [Customer Name],

We have detected a recent transaction on your account ending in 1234 for $1,200.00 on 15 April 2026. This was a purchase at "Acme Electronics" via our online banking portal.

If you authorized this transaction, no further action is required. If you did not authorize this payment, please contact our Customer Support immediately at 1-800-123-4567 or reply to this email.

Thank you for banking with us.

Best regards,
Customer Support Team
XYZ Bank

spam.subject: URGENT: Immediate Action Required for Gift Card Purchase
spam.body:
Dear [Employee Name],

I hope this message finds you well. Due to a recent audit of our corporate gift policy, I need your immediate assistance in procuring a $500 gift card for the upcoming client appreciation event.

Please use the following secure link to complete the purchase: <URL>

Once the card is purchased, forward the confirmation receipt to my inbox and CC me at ceo@company.com. This is a time-sensitive request – we must have the gift card before Friday, 18 April 2026, to meet the client’s deadline.

Failure to comply may result in a delay to the event and potential loss of client goodwill. I appreciate your prompt attention to this matter.

Thank you,

John Doe
Chief Executive Officer
Company Inc.
